_comment: Per-tmdb_id corrections for TMDB metadata that doesn't match how torrents/subtitle providers name the title. Seed: re-released films whose primary release_date points at a recent theatrical re-release, not the original. Add new entries when you find one.

556574._reason: TMDB primary release_date is 2025-09-05 (theatrical re-release). Disney+ original was 2020-07-03. Torrents are named with 2020.
